title: ATL Airport Flight Schedule
description: Input schedule format for the ATL airport SimPy simulation

flight_id.description: Unique identifier for this flight leg, e.g. 'DL123-20250601'

aircraft_type.description: Aircraft body type: narrow = single-aisle (737, A320, etc.), wide = twin-aisle (767, A330, 777, etc.)

operation.description: ARR = arrival at ATL, DEP = departure from ATL

scheduled_time.description: Scheduled operation time in HH:MM (24-hour) local time

origin.description: 3-letter IATA origin airport code (for DEP, this is ATL; for ARR, this is the inbound origin)

destination.description: 3-letter IATA destination airport code (for ARR, this is ATL; for DEP, this is the outbound dest)

_notes: CSV files should include a header row with these exact column names.
scheduled_time is HH:MM in local Eastern Time (ET).
scheduled_datetime overrides scheduled_time when both are present.
Paired ARR/DEP legs for the same aircraft should share tail_number.
gate_assigned should match the concourse prefix (e.g. A-concourse gates start with 'A').
